directions_tried.notes: Exploration 001 recovered a narrow positive result: the preferred exact phase object is the interface-based transfer-coherence ratio `C_ℓ` / `D_ℓ`, with backup `A_ℓ`. The old packet/sign families remain closed.

Exploration 002 closed the strategy with model-level failure. `C_ℓ` is forced to `±1` on one triad and can be made arbitrarily small on the first nontrivial two-input cluster while net receiver gain stays positive.

explorations_completed.key_takeaway: A theorem-facing intrinsic phase observable survived: the exact transfer-coherence ratio on a sign-closed helical triad population across one smooth scale interface. The next risk is model-level failure in the smallest honest exact setting.
The route dies at the minimal audit: `C_ℓ` is too tautological on one triad and too weak on the first nontrivial cluster, so the mission ends in model-level failure.
